nodes.name: 萨尔瓦多
nodes.summary: 萨尔瓦多是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联86种鸟类，包括山冠雉、White-bellied chachalaca、Spot-bellied bobwhite等86种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Mountain elaenia
nodes.summary: Mountain elaenia（Mountain elaenia，学名 Elaenia frantzii），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联10个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛。
locations: Bulletin of the British Ornithologists' Club

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In South America the species primarily inhabits open woodlands, scrublands, and pastures with scattered trees, and some coffee plantations and cloudforest in Colombia. In elevation it in occurs between in Central America, between in Colombia, between in the Venezuelan Andes, and between in the Serranía del Perijá
